历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Historical rankings from 2021–2024, only the 2025 minimum rank for Physics Category is approximately 414. The university has a very small enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia (only 2 students), and rank fluctuations are significantly affected by single-year random factors; the 2025 Physics Category plan is 2 students, and the 2026 Physics Category plan remains 2 students, with enrollment numbers unchanged. The 2026 enrollment plan file for History Category did not appear, possibly indicating no enrollment or data not included.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is 12th (up 2 places from 14th in 2025), with a very high university level and continuously improving ranking; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is high (10th overall), with large short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. In 2024, there was negative public opinion about a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but it has stabilized in 2025–2026; it shares 17 A- and above disciplines from Harbin Institute of Technology, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with engineering strength ranking top nationally. The Physics Category enrollment major (Engineering Experimental Class) directly corresponds to advantageous disciplines such as computer science, communications, and automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors like computer science, artificial intelligence, and electronic communications remains high, with the Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence/Future Information) being the current hottest direction. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 116,360 in 2025, with an estimated 110,800 Physics Category examinees, leading to intensified competition. The university is located in Shenzhen, with strong regional appeal; its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is extremely small (only 2 students), with high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline rank of 414, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolia examinee numbers, the rise in Soft Science ranking, and high Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, it is expected that competition in the 2026 Physics Category will intensify, and the minimum rank will move forward (number decreases). The predicted minimum rank is approximately 404, with a range of 354–454.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

No other Physics Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university only enrolls 2 students in Inner Mongolia's Physics Category. For ranks within the predicted range of 354–454, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice and use Tier 1 as a reach. If the rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<354), you can focus on reaching for the top-tier flagship majors (computer science and electronic communications); if the rank is close to the upper limit of the range (>454), the risk is higher, and it is advisable to pair with other universities as safety options.
